name: medication-reminder
description: 用药助手 Android 封装工程配置

scripts.android:copy-web: cp -r index.html manifest.json sw.js css js icons android-build/www/ && cp config.xml android-build/config.xml
scripts.android:add-platform: cd android-build && cordova platform add android
scripts.android:init: npm run android:clean && npm run android:create && npm run android:copy-web && npm run android:add-platform
